content: Le strade principali di molti villaggi sono state in effetti abbandonate. La ragione principale è l'avanzare di grandi supermercati come Wal-Mart.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by jacopofar (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:The main streets of many villages have in fact been abandoned. The main reason is the advance of big stores like Wal-Mar
